'''''G''-class shuttles''' were small, two-person [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] sometimes carried aboard [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class space cruisers]].

[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] used a ''G''-class to infiltrate [[Krayn]]'s ship and disable his weapons.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Jedi Quest 2|''Jedi Quest'' 2]]

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
